creator: vivek@khera.org
text:
Some updates to http://www.freebsd.org/platforms/amd64/motherboards.html

Fix: 

update to Dell PE800: FreeBSD 6.1 boots and runs fine with ACPI Timers
 disabled in loader.conf.  No more interrupt storms reported.

Update Dell 1850: runs fine with FreeBSD 6.1 (upgraded)

New: Dell PE SC1425 (without hardware RAID):  6.1 fully functional.  Only
 tested single proc.  One ATA controller shows up as "Intel ICH5 UDMA100" and
 the other as "Intel ICH5 SATA150".  em(4) NICs.

new: Dell PE SC430 with Pentium D dual core:  all works flawlessly, and
 *extremely* fast.  bge(4) NIC, One controller is "Intel ICH7 UDMA100" and
 the other is "Intel ICH7 SATA300".  No PS2 connectors -- USB only.
